instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Accepts a pending admin transfer. Only callable by the pending admin.

accounts.name: new_admin
docs: The pending admin who is accepting the transfer.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: bump_native
docs: Re-evaluates a native bonding curve's market cap against the current oracle price.
Marks the curve as complete if the market cap exceeds the migration threshold.

accounts.name: bonding_curve
docs: Bonding curve state.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The mint of the token.

accounts.name: pyth_price_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: buy_exact_in_native
docs: Buys tokens from the bonding curve by spending an exact amount of SOL (exact input).
# Arguments
* `amount_in` - Exact amount of SOL to spend (gross, before fees).
* `min_amount_out` - Minimum tokens expected (slippage protection).

instructions.name: buy_exact_in_stable
docs: Buys base tokens from a token-based bonding curve by spending an exact amount of quote tokens (exact input).
# Arguments
* `amount_in` - Exact amount of quote tokens (e.g., USDC) to spend (gross, before fees).
* `min_amount_out` - Minimum base tokens expected (slippage protection).

instructions.name: execute_buyback_native
docs: Executes a native SOL buyback (buy-and-burn) using accumulated revoked creator fees.
This is a permissionless instruction that can be called by anyone when there
are funds in the buyback vault. It uses the accumulated SOL to buy tokens
from the native curve and burn them, creating deflationary pressure.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can trigger the buyback (permissionless).

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint.

accounts.name: bonding_curve
docs: The bonding curve state.

accounts.name: buyback_vault
docs: The buyback vault holding accumulated SOL for buyback.

accounts.name: bonding_curve_sol_vault
docs: The bonding curve's SOL vault.

accounts.name: bonding_curve_token_account
docs: The bonding curve's token account.

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: WSOL mint (quote token for native curves).

accounts.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration for this token (must be in Revoked mode).

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: pyth_price_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: execute_buyback_token
docs: Executes a token-curve buyback (buy-and-burn) using accumulated revoked creator fees.
This is a permissionless instruction that can be called by anyone when there
are surplus quote tokens in the vault (from revoked creator fees). It uses
those tokens to buy base tokens from the curve and burn them.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can trigger the buyback (permissionless).

accounts.name: mint
docs: The base token mint (Token2022).

accounts.name: bonding_curve
docs: The token bonding curve state.

accounts.name: bonding_curve_quote_vault
docs: The bonding curve's quote token vault.

accounts.name: buyback_vault
docs: Dedicated buyback vault (PDA token account).

accounts.name: bonding_curve_token_account
docs: The bonding curve's base token account (for burning).

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration for the protocol.

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote token mint (e.g., USDC).

accounts.name: fee_config
docs: The fee configuration for this token (must be in Revoked mode).

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard token program for quote token.

accounts.name: token_program_2022
docs: Token-2022 program for base token burning.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initializes the protocol's global configuration and volume accumulator.
Note: Fee recipients are NOT set during initialization. Call `set_fee_recipients`
after initialization to configure the protocol's fee recipients.
# Arguments
* `initial_virtual_token_reserves` - Initial virtual token reserves for new curves.
* `initial_virtual_reserve_usd` - Initial virtual reserve value in USD (6 decimals) for new curves.
* `migration_market_cap_usd` - Migration threshold market cap in USD (6 decimals).
* `initial_real_token_reserves` - Initial real token reserves for new curves.
* `token_total_supply` - Total supply for new tokens.
* `creator_fee_basis_points` - Fee basis points for token creators.
* `creator_referral_reward_basis_points` - Referral reward basis points for creators.
* `trader_referral_reward_basis_points` - Referral reward basis points for traders.
* `protocol_fee_basis_points` - Protocol fee basis points.
* `quote_mints` - List of valid quote mints.
* `sol_usd_price_feed` - Pyth SOL/USD price feed account.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin initializing the protocol.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be initialized.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

instructions.name: initialize_fee_recipient_vaults
docs: Initializes token vaults for all fee recipients for a given quote mint.
This is a permissionless, idempotent instruction that creates token accounts
for fee recipients. Anyone can call this to ensure protocol fees can be collected
for token-based trading pairs.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer for account creation (permissionless - anyone can pay).

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration (read-only, to validate fee_recipients).

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote mint to create token accounts for.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for the quote mint.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated token program for ATA creation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

accounts.name: quote_mint

instructions.name: set_fee_recipients
docs: Sets the protocol's fee recipients. Only callable by the admin.
# Arguments
* `fee_recipients` - List of protocol fee recipients (must be exactly NUM_FEE_RECIPIENTS).

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin authorized to update the global config.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: transfer_admin
docs: Proposes an admin transfer to a new address. Only callable by the current admin.
The new admin must call `accept_admin` to complete the transfer.
# Arguments
* `new_admin` - The proposed new admin authority public key.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The current admin authorizing the transfer.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Unpauses the protocol. Only callable by admin.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: update
docs: Updates the protocol's global configuration. Only callable by the admin.
# Arguments
* `initial_virtual_token_reserves` - Optional new value for initial virtual token reserves
* `initial_virtual_reserve_usd` - Optional new value for initial virtual reserve in USD (6 decimals)
* `migration_market_cap_usd` - Optional new value for migration threshold in USD (6 decimals)
* `initial_real_token_reserves` - Optional new value for initial real token reserves
* `token_total_supply` - Optional new value for token total supply
* `creator_fee_basis_points` - Optional new value for creator fee basis points
* `creator_referral_reward_basis_points` - Optional new value for creator referral reward
* `trader_referral_reward_basis_points` - Optional new value for trader referral reward
* `protocol_fee_basis_points` - Optional new value for protocol fee basis points
* `quote_mints` - Optional new list of valid quote mints
* `sol_usd_price_feed` - Optional new Pyth SOL/USD price feed account.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin authorized to update the global config.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Global configuration account to be updated.

instructions.name: withdraw_referral_rewards
docs: Withdraws accrued native SOL referral rewards from the user's referral vault to their wallet.

accounts.name: referral_vault
docs: The vault that will hold referral fees.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

instructions.name: withdraw_referral_token_rewards
docs: Withdraws accrued token referral rewards from a PDA vault to the user's token account.

accounts.name: referral_vault
docs: PDA token vault holding referral rewards.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's token account to receive the withdrawn tokens.

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote mint for the referral vault.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: CPI authority PDA â€” proves this program's identity in cross-program calls.

accounts.name: liquid_events_program
docs: Liquid events program for centralized event emission.

errors.name: InvalidAdminAuthority
errors.msg: The provided admin authority is invalid

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: You are not authorized to perform this action

errors.name: NoPendingAdminTransfer
errors.msg: No pending admin transfer exists

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Caller is not the pending admin

errors.name: ReferrerNotSet
errors.msg: User has a referrer set but the referrer vault was not provided

errors.name: ReferrerIsSelf
errors.msg: A user cannot refer themself

errors.name: ReferrerInvalid
errors.msg: The provided referrer is invalid

errors.name: InvalidCreator
errors.msg: The provided creator does not match the bonding curve creator

errors.name: NameInvalidLength
errors.msg: Token name length is invalid

errors.name: SymbolInvalidLength
errors.msg: Token symbol length is invalid

errors.name: UriInvalidLength
errors.msg: Token URI length is invalid

errors.name: UriInvalidFormat
errors.msg: Token URI must start with http, https, or ipfs

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: The provided amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: BondingCurveComplete
errors.msg: Bonding curve is complete and trading is halted

errors.name: CurveNotComplete
errors.msg: Bonding curve is not complete

errors.name: AlreadyMigrated
errors.msg: Bonding curve has already been migrated

errors.name: InsufficientSolForMigration
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL reserves for migration

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Slippage tolerance exceeded

errors.name: CreatorFeesRevoked
errors.msg: Creator fees have been permanently revoked

errors.name: CreatorFeesAlreadyRevoked
errors.msg: Creator fees have already been revoked

errors.name: InvalidFeeAccountInput
errors.msg: Invalid fee configuration account

errors.name: FeeConfigurationAlreadyExists
errors.msg: A fee configuration already exists. Detach it first before attaching a new one

errors.name: IncorrectFeeRecipientsCount
errors.msg: Incorrect number of protocol fee recipients provided

errors.name: InvalidFeeRecipient
errors.msg: The fee recipient provided is not in the global configuration

errors.name: InvalidProtocolConfiguration
errors.msg: Invalid protocol configuration

errors.name: InvalidFeeConfiguration
errors.msg: Invalid fee configuration. Total must be 10000 bps with no duplicate recipients

errors.name: InvalidRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: Invalid remaining accounts for fee distribution

errors.name: CannotChangeCashbackMode
errors.msg: Cannot activate spending mode without existing cashback credits

errors.name: FeesMustBeWithdrawn
errors.msg: Existing creator fees must be fully withdrawn before updating the configuration

errors.name: TooManyQuoteMints
errors.msg: Too many quote mints provided

errors.name: InvalidTokenTotalSupply
errors.msg: Invalid token total supply. Must be greater than initial real token reserves

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic operation resulted in overflow

errors.name: InvalidCashbackConfiguration
errors.msg: Cashback ranges must be contiguous and non-overlapping

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Individual fee cannot exceed maximum

errors.name: InvalidMigrateAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid migrate authority address

errors.name: DuplicateQuoteMint
errors.msg: Duplicate quote mint provided

errors.name: InvalidReserves
errors.msg: Reserve values must be greater than zero

errors.name: CurveComplete
errors.msg: Curve has already completed trading

errors.name: CreatorFeesNotRevoked
errors.msg: Creator fees have not been revoked - buyback not available

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused

errors.name: InvalidPriceFeed
errors.msg: Invalid price feed account

errors.name: StalePriceFeed
errors.msg: Price feed data is stale

errors.name: InvalidQuoteMint
errors.msg: Invalid quote mint - not in whitelist

errors.name: InvalidMultiplier
errors.msg: Computed ScaledUiAmount multiplier is invalid (zero, negative, NaN, or subnormal)

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Invalid token account address

errors.name: BuybackVaultNotDrained
errors.msg: Buyback vault must be drained before migration

errors.name: ExclusivityPeriod
errors.msg: This action cannot be performed during the exclusivity period

types.name: CashbackConfiguration
docs: Global cashback configuration
PDA: [b"cashback_config"]

fields.name: admin_authority
docs: Admin authority who can update configuration

fields.name: ranges
docs: Balance-based multiplier ranges (use len() for active count).
Thresholds refer to the user's cashback credit balance. Multiplier is
applied progressively as credits are earned, not at mode-switch.

fields.name: trader_cashback_basis_points
docs: Base trader cashback rate in basis points

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Pending admin authority for two-step transfer. None if no transfer is in progress.

types.name: CashbackRange
docs: Cashback range defining balance-based multiplier tiers.
Each range maps a cashback balance interval to a multiplier. When a user earns
cashback, the earned amount is multiplied by the tier corresponding to their
current balance. If earning crosses a tier boundary, the amount is split so
each portion receives its respective tier's multiplier.

fields.name: range_start_inclusive
docs: Lower bound of balance range (inclusive), in USD with 6 decimals

fields.name: range_end_exclusive
docs: Upper bound of balance range (exclusive), in USD with 6 decimals

fields.name: multiplier_basis_points
docs: Multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x, 20000 = 2x)

types.name: CreateStableCurveArgs
docs: Arguments for creating a new token with a token-based bonding curve.

fields.name: name
docs: Name of the token.

fields.name: symbol
docs: Symbol of the token.

fields.name: uri
docs: URI pointing to off-chain JSON metadata.

types.name: CreateTokenArgs
docs: Arguments for creating a new token.

fields.name: name
docs: Name of the token.

fields.name: symbol
docs: Symbol of the token.

fields.name: uri
docs: URI pointing to off-chain JSON metadata.

types.name: CurveStatus
docs: Lifecycle state of a bonding curve.

types.name: FeeMode
docs: The fee distribution mode for a token's fee configuration.

types.name: FeeRecipient
docs: A fee recipient with their allocation and vault PDA bump.

fields.name: pubkey
docs: The public key of the fee recipient.

fields.name: basis_points
docs: The recipient's share of fees in basis points (out of 10,000).

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: The bump seed for the recipient's vault PDA.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Padding to align to 8-byte boundary (32 + 2 + 1 + 5 = 40 bytes).

fields.name: admin_authority
docs: Admin authority who can update the global configuration.

fields.name: initial_virtual_reserve_usd
docs: Initial virtual reserve value in USD (6 decimals, e.g., $4,500 = 4_500_000_000).
For native curves, this is converted to SOL via oracle to get the initial virtual SOL reserves.
For stable curves, this is used directly as the initial virtual quote reserves.
Note: The actual initial market cap is `initial_virtual_reserve_usd * total_supply / virtual_tokens`.

fields.name: migration_market_cap_usd
docs: Migration market cap threshold in USD (6 decimals, e.g., $69,420 = 69_420_000_000).
When the curve's market cap reaches this value, it becomes complete and ready for migration.

fields.name: initial_virtual_token_reserves
docs: Initial virtual token reserves for bonding curves.

fields.name: initial_real_token_reserves
docs: Initial real token reserves for bonding curves.

fields.name: token_total_supply
docs: Total supply for new tokens.

fields.name: creator_fee_basis_points
docs: Fee basis points for token creators.

fields.name: creator_referral_reward_basis_points
docs: Referral reward basis points for creators.

fields.name: trader_referral_reward_basis_points
docs: Referral reward basis points for traders.

fields.name: protocol_fee_basis_points
docs: Protocol fee basis points.

fields.name: fee_recipients
docs: List of valid protocol fee recipients.

fields.name: quote_mints
docs: List of whitelisted quote mints for stable curves.

fields.name: sol_usd_price_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed account.

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Pending admin authority for two-step transfer. None if no transfer is in progress.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump to identify PDA.

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether the protocol is paused (emergency stop).

types.name: GlobalCurveVolumeAccumulator
docs: Global volume accumulator for bonding curve trades
PDA: [b"global_curve_volume"]

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume across all curve trades (6 decimals)

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume across all curve trades

fields.name: creator
docs: The creator of the bonding curve.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint address.

fields.name: real_token_reserves
docs: Real token supply.

fields.name: virtual_token_reserves
docs: Virtual token supply (fixed at creation).

fields.name: real_sol_reserves
docs: Real SOL supply.

fields.name: token_total_supply
docs: Total minted token supply.

fields.name: initial_virtual_reserve_usd
docs: Initial virtual reserve value in USD (6 decimals), snapshotted at creation.

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle state of the bonding curve (Active â†’ Complete â†’ Migrated).

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump to identify PDA.

types.name: ReferrerInfo
docs: Referrer information attached to a user

fields.name: referrer
docs: The referrer's public key

fields.name: deal
docs: Deal PDA the user redeemed (None if no deal redeemed)

fields.name: cashback_multiplier_bps
docs: Cashback multiplier in basis points (10000 = 1x, default)

types.name: StableBondingCurve
docs: Token-based bonding curve state for trading against a quote token (e.g., USDC).
Unlike NativeBondingCurve where virtual reserves are calculated dynamically from
an oracle, StableBondingCurve has fixed virtual reserves since the quote token
is already USD-denominated (for stablecoins) or has a known fixed value.

fields.name: creator
docs: The creator of the bonding curve.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Base token mint address (the launched token).

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote token mint address (e.g., USDC).

fields.name: real_token_reserves
docs: Real token reserves (actual tokens in the curve).

fields.name: virtual_token_reserves
docs: Virtual token reserves (for curve formula).

fields.name: real_quote_reserves
docs: Real quote reserves (actual quote tokens in the curve).

fields.name: virtual_quote_reserves
docs: Virtual quote reserves (for curve formula, fixed for stablecoins).

fields.name: token_total_supply
docs: Total minted token supply.

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle state of the bonding curve (Active â†’ Complete â†’ Migrated).

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump to identify PDA.

types.name: TokenVolumeAccumulator
docs: Token-specific volume accumulator (unified across curve and AMM)
PDA: [b"token_volume", mint.key()]

fields.name: mint
docs: Token mint this accumulator tracks

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume for this token (curve + AMM, 6 decimals)

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume for this token (curve + AMM)

fields.name: curve_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from curve trades (for analytics)

fields.name: amm_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from AMM trades (for analytics)

types.name: UnifiedFeeConfiguration
docs: Unified fee configuration for a token, supporting both Recipients and Revoked modes.
Stored as a zero-copy account for efficient access in hot paths.

fields.name: creator
docs: The creator who owns this fee configuration

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint this configuration applies to.
This is the key identifier that persists across migration from bonding curve to AMM.

fields.name: quote_mint
docs: The quote token mint used for fee accumulation (e.g., WSOL for native curves, USDC for stable).
`Pubkey::default()` indicates no token fee vault (Revoked-only configs).

fields.name: fee_mode
docs: Current fee mode

fields.name: recipients_count
docs: Number of active recipients in the recipients array

fields.name: recipients
docs: Recipients for Recipients mode (fixed array, use recipients_count for active length)

fields.name: update_authority
docs: Authority that can modify this configuration (initially creator)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation

types.name: UserProperties
docs: User properties account tracking referrals, volumes, cashback, and snapshots
PDA: [b"user_properties", user.key()]

fields.name: referrer
docs: Referrer info (pubkey, deal, multiplier)

fields.name: total_usd_volume
docs: Total USD volume traded across both curve and AMM

fields.name: total_token_volume
docs: Total token volume traded across both curve and AMM

fields.name: cashback_credits
docs: Cashback credits (abstract credits when earning, SOL lamports when spending)

fields.name: is_spending
docs: Whether user is in spending mode (true) or earning mode (false)

fields.name: curve_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from curve trades only (for analytics)

fields.name: amm_usd_volume
docs: USD volume from AMM trades only (for analytics)

fields.name: snapshot_usd_volume
docs: USD volume accumulated since the last snapshot (resets on snapshot)

fields.name: snapshot_token_volume
docs: Token volume accumulated since the last snapshot (resets on snapshot)

fields.name: snapshot_count
docs: Number of snapshots taken for this user

fields.name: latest_snapshot
docs: PDA of the latest snapshot (head of linked list, None if no snapshots)
